name: Erratic Engine
description: One of the ancient Engines has become dangerously unstable, causing dungeon geometry to shift and rearrange unpredictably. No corridor can be trusted.

events.name: First Shift Detected
events.description: An Engine has hiccupped. A known route now leads somewhere else entirely.

events.name: Routes Warped
events.description: Multiple travel routes have rearranged. Maps are becoming unreliable.

events.name: Engine Critical
events.description: The Engine's output is spiking. Dungeons may begin rearranging themselves in real time.
